Event: Atlantian Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 06/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: T217
Seal of Atlantis Higher Totem

For the duration of the battle, the totem's owner and all allied units have their incoming and outgoing healing increased by 15%, while the incoming and outgoing healing of all enemy units is reduced by 10%.

Once in a while, the unit casts improved restoration upon self and all allied mages. The targets have 3 random negative effects removed from each of them. Targets restore 20% health, and all of their stats increase by 20% for 3 sec.

- Level 20
For the duration of the battle, the totem's owner and all allied units have their incoming and outgoing healing increased by 20%, while the incoming and outgoing healing of all enemy units is reduced by 15%.

Once in a while, the unit casts improved restoration upon self and all allied mages. The targets have 3 random negative effects removed from each of them. Targets restore 25% health, and all of their stats increase by 25% for 4 sec.

- Level 40
For the duration of the battle, the totem's owner and all allied units have their incoming and outgoing healing increased by 25%, while the incoming and outgoing healing of all enemy units is reduced by 20%.

Once in a while, the unit casts improved restoration upon self and all allied mages. The targets have 3 random negative effects removed from each of them. Targets restore 30% health, and all of their stats increase by 30% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90
